name: Hawaiian Baby Woodrose (Argyreia nervosa)
summary: Hawaiian baby woodrose contains ergoline alkaloids including LSA, but lacks controlled therapeutic human evidence.
description: Ethnobotanical/psychoactive seed source with variable alkaloid content and mainly pharmacological inference.
contraindications: and toxicity risk from variable alkaloid content.
conditions: not enough human evidence for a consumer recommendation
buying_criteria: Do not promote as a general consumer product
keep as research/reference unless human supplement evidence and safety context are added
